Finding.Description: Typo in High-Level Requirement name HL-MAP-2.2: "Cell Clasification" should be "Cell Classification" for consistency and traceability.
Finding.Solution: Rename HL-MAP-2.2 Name to "Cell Classification" and propagate the corrected name to all references and tooling that consume HL names.

Finding.Description: LL-LOC-7.1 currently contains a DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.1 while also Refining HL-EXPL-1.1. This creates redundancy and potential circularity in the traceability graph.
Finding.Solution: Update LL-LOC-7.1 Relationships to remove the DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.1. The Relationships should be: Refines HL-EXPL-1.1; DependsOn LL-EXPL-1.2; DependsOn LL-INTERF-6.1; DependsOn LL-MAP-2.1.

Finding.Description: Redundancy in LL-LOC-7.1: It both refines HL-EXPL-1.1 and depends on LL-EXPL-1.1. This can confuse traceability and coupling.
Finding.Solution: Choose a single trace mechanism linking LL-LOC-7.1 to HL-EXPL-1.1. The recommended approach is to keep the Refines HL-EXPL-1.1 relationship and remove the LL-EXPL-1.1 dependency. Ensure consistency across all related LL requirements.
